summary: Completed comprehensive testing of XI Ventures ambient AI interface. All core functionality is working perfectly with 100% test success rate. The ambient AI chat system successfully replaced the traditional contact form with intelligent conversation capabilities.
passed_tests: Chat API - High-intent message detection with email capture trigger
Frontend - Ambient input field visibility and placeholder text
Frontend - User message display in conversation area
Frontend - AI response display with 'XI Intelligence' label
Frontend - Action button (Share Email) appears on high-intent messages
Frontend - Email capture modal opens and form submission works
Frontend - Multi-turn conversation UI with proper message threading
Frontend - Conversation scrolling and user experience
